identity.tone: Bold, Premium, Trustworthy, Modern African Tech
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix African warmth with Swiss precision.
Emotion First: Every screen must build trust.
Content is King: Direct the user's eye with purpose.
Zoom In: Bold focus on key metrics.

effects.glass_card: bg-zinc-900/60 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 hover:border-green-500/20 transition-colors duration-300

elements: Sub: 'The all-in-one platform for African entrepreneurs. Automate sales, manage inventory, and grow faster.'
CTA: Primary Green Button with arrow icon
Visual: Floating 3D phone showing WhatsApp chat interface with bot replies

dashboard.structure: Sidebar Navigation + Top Bar + Main Content Area

onboarding.animation: Slide-in from right, fade-out to left

buttons.primary: bg-[#25D366] text-black font-semibold hover:bg-[#20bd5a] rounded-full px-8 py-3 shadow-[0_0_20px_-5px_rgba(37,211,102,0.4)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-white hover:bg-zinc-700 rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-zinc-800/50 rounded-full px-4 py-2 transition-all

cards.stat_card: relative overflow-hidden bg-zinc-900/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 p-6 rounded-2xl hover:border-green-500/20 transition-all group
cards.feature_card: bg-zinc-900/30 border border-zinc-800 p-8 rounded-3xl hover:bg-zinc-900/50 transition-all

inputs.default: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 focus:border-[#25D366] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#25D366] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 transition-all

chat_bubbles.user: bg-[#25D366] text-black rounded-2xl rounded-tr-none p-4 max-w-[80%] self-end shadow-md
chat_bubbles.bot: bg-zinc-800 text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tl-none p-4 max-w-[80%] self-start border border-zinc-700

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text on #25D366 is BLACK. Text on Zinc-900 is WHITE/ZINC-200.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Install dependencies: `npm install framer-motion lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge`
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Update `tailwind.config.ts` with the provided colors and font families.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Create `components/ui/button.tsx`, `components/ui/card.tsx`, `components/ui/input.tsx` using Shadcn-like structure but with custom styles defined above.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Implement the Dashboard Layout with Sidebar.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Build the Landing Page with Hero and Features.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients on text unless specified.
Use 'gap-4' minimum for all flex/grid layouts.
Ensure mobile responsiveness for all tables (use scroll containers).
